## Checklist

- [ ] Patch anchors verified (`tools/check-anchors.sh` passes for affected versions)
- [ ] Build verified (`./gradlew :core:compileScala` at minimum)
- [ ] Evidence file updated if any claim or measured number changed
- [ ] Documentation updated (docs/, README, CHANGELOG)
- [ ] No sensitive information (IPs, account IDs, customer names)
- [ ] SVG diagrams updated if topology/flow changed
